docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, AURA G.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75885833) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ, AURA G NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-15-2025
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-29-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED IS GRANTED. THE RECORD DEMONSTRATES DEFENDANT AURA G. ALVAREZ DID NOT PROVIDE ANY RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS. SET ONE. (SEE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 2033.280.) DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO TIMELY RESPOND IS NOT EXCUSED. NO MEET AND CONFER REQUIREMENT WHEN NO RESPONSES HAVE BEEN PROVIDED. PLAINTIFFS' RFAS, SET ONE ARE DEEMED ADMITTED.PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-15-28 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted; Memorandum In Support Of Motion; Declaration In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Dec-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted.

Plaintiff Citibank, N.A.'s unopposed Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted is GRANTED.

The record demonstrates Defendant Aura G. Alvarez did not provide any responses to Plaintiff's Request For Admissions. Set One. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280.) Defendant's failure to timely respond is not excused. No meet and confer requirement when no responses have been provided.

Plaintiffs' RFAs, Set One are deemed admitted.

Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-02-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
